subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath raised up to exalt His proofs and evidences, to manifest His signs and sovereignty, and to proclaim [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اقامه الله علی اعلاء حججته و برهانه و اظهار دلائله و سلطانه و تبلیغ
subcodes.subjects: @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
